title: Admin System Frontend Update Request
description: Request a FRONTEND-only update for the CURRENT instance. The frontend ships independently of the core and is stateless, so there is no migration-risk field. Intentionally has NO instance_id: the backend derives and verifies the instance identity server-side, so the browser can never target a different instance. additionalProperties:false rejects any instance_id (or other unknown field).

target_version.description: Frontend version to update this instance to.

preflight_id.description: Id of the frontend preflight the operator reviewed. The backend recomputes the preflight server-side regardless.
